name: Chocolate Fruit and Nut Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 box devils food cake mix (18.25 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place brandy in a small bowl. Microwave at high for 15 to 45 seconds, or until hot.
2. Add dates and raisins. Soak for at least 15 minutes.
3. Grease a 12-cup Bundt Pan with sugar. Set aside.
4. In a medium mixing bowl, combine cake mix, coffee, oil, eggs, water, cinnamon, and allspice.
5. Beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until blended, 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Microwave at 50% (medium) for 10 minutes.
8. Increase power to high. Microwave for 4 to 5 1/2 minutes longer, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes. Invert onto a serving plate and cool.
10. Frost with Cream Cheese Frosting (below) if desired. Garnish with strawberries and mint leaves.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. In a Mighty Pitcher, combine cream cheese, butter, and milk. Microwave at 50% (medium) for 1 minute, or until cheese and butter are soft.
2. Mix well. Add lemon juice and enough sugar for the desired consistency.
3. Beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth. Serves 18 to 24.
